summary: Fixed critical JSX syntax error in Globe.js (escaped quotes issue). Backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads and displays data properly. Globe renders with visible red ACLED event markers but click interactions still not working due to onPointClick handler not firing.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTML instead of JSON API response
minor_bugs.impact: Root endpoint serves frontend instead of API metadata, but all /api/* endpoints work correctly

ui_bugs.issue: onPointClick handler not executing despite visible red ACLED markers and proper event data loading
ui_bugs.description: Globe renders correctly with 8 visible red markers, ACLED data loads (confirmed via localStorage), pointer events enabled on canvas, but clicking markers doesn't trigger console.log or popup
ui_bugs.debug_info: useEffect deps [events, portHedlandData, isSimulating] may cause re-binding issues. Globe instance not accessible from window. Pointer events='auto', cursor='pointer' on canvas.

passed_tests: Fixed JSX syntax error - Globe.js now compiles successfully
Backend 5/6 API tests passed (ACLED, ASX, Port Hedland, simulate endpoints working)
Frontend loads Market Oracle AI interface correctly
Globe renders 3D Earth with night sky background
ACLED API returns 8 events successfully (Iran, DRC, China, etc.)
8 red ACLED conflict markers visible on globe surface
ASX ticker strip shows all 5 tickers with live prices and changes
Port Hedland badge displays HIGH congestion with 14 vessels
Instructions section present with Iran/Strait of Hormuz demo tip
Globe canvas has proper pointer events enabled
Professional dark theme layout and proper spacing
action_item_for_main_agent: Globe click interactions still broken. Issue is in useEffect dependencies [events, portHedlandData, isSimulating] in Globe.js. The onPointClick handler appears to be getting overridden or not properly bound when events data updates. Need to debug React state management and Globe.gl event binding timing. Red markers are visible and data is loading correctly, but the event handler isn't firing.

success_percentage.backend: 83% (5/6 tests passed - minor root endpoint issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (major syntax error fixed, data loading and rendering works, but critical click interaction still broken)
